limitations: The market REST record was retrieved after settlement; effective-time coverage is a reviewed retrospective conclusion, not a contemporaneous metadata snapshot.
The retained series record identifies the official contract-terms and certification URLs, but this initial reviewed package retains the market-specific rule text rather than the linked PDF bytes.
Fee type, multiplier, and rounding identity are retained for compatibility only; B1a does not calculate or apply fees.
The REST product sources do not expose the WebSocket market UUID, so that UUID remains capture-derived identity.
